raw_consumer_statement:
I am disputing a predatory balance and unconscionable lending practices by Citibank ( Best Buy XXXX XXXX ). 

In early XXXX, I purchased a television for {$1900.00}. Based on my bank statement audit, I have paid Citibank {$3400.00} since that purchase. Despite paying 175 % of the original principal, Citibank claims I still owe a remaining balance of {$1600.00} due to a deferred interest 'trap ' and a 29 % APR. 

Furthermore, my official credit report ( attached ) shows this account was marked as 'CLOSED ' as of XX/XX/XXXX. Despite the account being closed and the credit line terminated, Citibank continues to accrue high interest and demand monthly payments. 
I have a 7-year history of 100 % on-time payments with this institution ( see attached payment history ). When I called to negotiate a good-faith settlement, a supervisor abruptly terminated the call the moment I requested a XXXX-balance waiver. 

I have now revoked my authorization for automatic drafts. I am requesting that Citibank perform a Goodwill Adjustment to bring this balance to {$0.00} and settle the account as 'Paid in Full, ' given that the principal and a significant profit have already been satisfied.
